commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

commit.message:
Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix critical stability issues for paying users

- Progress API: fix broken GET handler that constructed fake Blob URLs
  instead of using @vercel/blob list() SDK. Users' progress was lost
  across browser sessions. POST now uses addRandomSuffix: false for
  deterministic paths.
- Certificate API: same Blob URL fix in loadUserProgress helper.
  Certificates could fail to generate if progress wasn't found.
- Stripe webhook: if user creation fails, error now propagates to
  return 500 so Stripe retries the webhook. Previously swallowed the
  error and returned 200, meaning paying users could lose their account.
  Email send failures are still handled gracefully (user can use /login).
- Email: add placeholder API key check to prevent silent failures.

commit.message:
fix: 无连接图像时强制取消复选框选中状态

问题：当镜头没有连接图像时，复选框仍然保持选中状态，
导致用户困惑。

解决方案：
- 添加 watch 监听器监听 canUseConnectionFirstFrame
- 添加 watch 监听器监听 canUseConnectionLastFrame
- 当连接图像不可用时，自动强制将对应的 checkbox 值设置为 false

效果：
- 有连接图像：复选框可选中
- 无连接图像：复选框不可选中且自动取消选中状态

fix: use shared PrismaClient singleton to prevent connection pool exhaustion

All 14 route files were creating their own PrismaClient instance, causing ~70
concurrent DB connections and hitting Supabase's MaxClientsInSessionMode limit.
Now all routes use the shared singleton from src/config/database.js.

Add ambient narrator startup health check

Verify API connectivity with a single probe call before starting the
background loop. If it fails (429, auth error, timeout), disable
immediately with a clear message instead of failing repeatedly
throughout the run.

commit.message:
fix(queries): wrap all sub-table queries in safeQuery to handle missing tables

PostgREST throws (instead of returning error) when a table doesn't
exist in the schema cache. The training_loads, injuries, player_notes,
and utr_history queries in getPlayerWithDetailsServer were inside a
bare Promise.all — one missing table crashed them all.

Also adds try-catch to coach player detail page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix listen ring never draining: use higher music detection threshold

The ring was using SILENCE_THRESHOLD (0.005 RMS) which ambient room
noise exceeds, so isPlaying was almost always true. Raised to 0.02
RMS (~-35dB) which requires actual music, not just background chatter.
Ring now properly pauses/drains when music stops.

commit.message:
Fix Drive browser: remove double /api prefix in file listing URL

loadDriveFiles() built URLs as /api/gdrive/files but then passed them
through API.get() which adds its own /api prefix, resulting in
/api/api/gdrive/files — hitting the SPA fallback and returning HTML
instead of JSON.

commit.message:
perf: use cursor-based getRecentLocalMessages for cache-first loading

getLocalMessages loads ALL messages from IndexedDB (16k+ for Main session),
causing slow cache-first display. New getRecentLocalMessages uses byTimestamp
index with reverse cursor to fetch only the latest 100 messages.

Improve UI theme and readability across all panels

- Replace egui's built-in collapse arrows with custom bright triangles
  in both hierarchy and properties panels to fix invisible arrow issue
- Add theme::collapsing_section() helper for consistent themed sections
- Explicitly set text_color() on all labels to fix visibility in child UIs
  where override_text_color does not propagate (CollapsingState, etc.)
- Replace all CollapsingHeader usage in properties panel with themed sections
- Fix menu bar File/Edit labels with explicit colors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: proposal creation - resolve hot_leads schema not found in serverless function

Root cause: Postgres trigger function update_hot_lead_proposal_count() referenced
'hot_leads' without the public. prefix. Postgres functions run with a restricted
search_path that excludes 'public' by default, so every proposals INSERT fired the
trigger which then threw: relation "hot_leads" does not exist → PostgREST returned 404.

Fix applied directly to live DB (ietshbhcugjtnwqnnptg):
- CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION with SET search_path = public on the function definition
- All UPDATE hot_leads references now use public.hot_leads
- Verified via pg_proc: proconfig = ["search_path=public"] ✓

Migration file added for reference: migrations/fix_proposal_trigger_search_path.sql

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 改进对话上下文理解和prompt设置

问题：
- AI在第二轮对话中"自说自话"
- 不理解用户的问题，自己说别的内容
- 对话不连贯，没有针对性

原因分析：
- System prompt太简单，只说"根据用户说的话回复"
- 没有强调"理解和回应用户的具体问题"
- 缺少对话连贯性的明确指导

优化方案：

1. **改进System Prompt**：
   - 强调"理解并回应"原则
   - 明确禁止"自说自话"
   - 添加对话连贯性要求
   - 提供具体示例对话
   - 强调要在回应用户之后再引导

2. **添加调试日志**：
   - 输出每条历史对话内容
   - 输出当前用户输入
   - 显示总消息数量
   - 方便排查对话历史传递问题

新的Prompt特点：
- 明确要求理解用户意图
- 强调针对性回答
- 提供具体对话示例参考
- 保持自然口语化风格

效果：
- AI会更关注用户的问题
- 对话更连贯和有针对性
- 减少"自说自话"的情况

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: code hygiene — geocoding utility, compare.py dedup, clarity comments

Fix 1 — Extract geocoding to utils/geo.py
  - Single geocode_address() handles both nested + top-level API response formats
  - Removes _geocode_location() from search.py (was using nested parsing)
  - Removes inline http_post geocoding from landmarks.py (was using top-level parsing)
  - Silent inconsistency between the two callers eliminated

Fix 2 — Eliminate compare.py duplicate HTTP helpers
  - _fetch_details_raw(prop_id) added to property_details.py
  - _fetch_rooms_raw(eazypg_id) added to room_details.py
  - compare.py imports these instead of copy-pasting the HTTP calls
  - Removes httpx + config imports from compare.py

Fix 3 — Skill resolution order comment in main.py
  - 3-step numbered block: supervisor → safety-net → heuristic-fallback
  - Junior-readable without changing any logic

Fix 4 — Intentional comments on all bare pass blocks
  - compare.py, message_parser.py (×2), redis_store.py (×4)
  - Each explains exactly why the exception is safely swallowed

commit.message:
Fix FriendKeeper contact dedup and count preservation

- Sync endpoint: use GREATEST instead of overwrite for counts, preventing
  collector from zeroing out historical counts
- Post-sync dedup: merge duplicate contacts by display_name in the DB,
  using MAX (not SUM) since duplicates represent the same person
- Migration 014: one-time DB cleanup to merge 106 duplicate contact groups
  and recompute counts from events where they were zeroed
- Export mergeInto: use Math.max instead of sum for count merging

- Added file_exists property to BackupRecord model

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stale video cache when slide visuals change

Compose tasks only depended on manifest.json (file list), not the
actual slide images. When extract_images re-rendered PNGs, the manifest
content stayed the same so doit skipped recomposition. Add visual_hash
to each compose task's config_changed so visual edits propagate through
the full pipeline.
